author: Josef C.
pros: Ease of use and the performance (fast loading speeds). Very customizable.
cons: Missing mobile and tablet app functionalifies
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Implementing the program in the organisation was rather easy and everybody seemed to get along with it from the very begining very nicely.
author: Miguel A. R.
pros: The use is very instinctive and user friendly. It is highly customisable.
cons: It does crush regularly and sometimer it does take way to long to load.

description: Everyone is hating papershift (also the responsible) in our company. I can't take my free time because Papershift is not able to calc it SINCE 6 MONTHS !!!
author: Carsten A.
pros: nothing, but it is very colourful :-(
cons: Changes from superior are not reported by email, time calculation not working since 6 month, confusing design, chat support is very awkward
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The one tool I use everyday
description: There are functionalities for everything I need. It fits perfectly in my daily job. It helps me to manage my times, organise my vacations, track my overtimes.
author: Albin B.
pros: Easy to use tool with all the necessary options and beyond. It helps me easily manage, track and organise my times on a daily basis.
cons: I basically like everything. However the mobile app wasn't on its best, but the web app is good enough to cover the mobile need as well.

description: 6 hotels, mostly student staff that needs to change shifts frequently. Different hours every month
author: Peter F.
pros: Intuitive to use, fast, platform independent
cons: App, sometime the menu is confusing. Diagrams would be great.

description: I use every week to check the shifts at work, which is very simple and easy.
author: Maria S.
pros: I like how simple and easy the app is to use that it is helpful to what I need to do.
cons: I had some difficulties finding extra settings. I want to use more than I usually do.

review_title: The apt forware for your payroll attendance tracking
description: This has been nice and satisfactory to business needs making it worth the deal
author: Aditya Y.
pros: The easiness of punch-in & out for employees, the leave balance, hour balance is clearly shown. The application of leave and work tags make it easier to communicate with the administrator.
cons: The onboarding can be more helpful overall but it was still good.

description: Overall we had a great experience with Papershift so far. Especially the support is excellent and very supportive when one is having issues or need help with certain features.
author: Volker P.
pros: At our doctors office we were looking for an easy to use software to track our employees working hours. With the support from the Papaershift team it was easy and really straightforward. It’s easy to use for the daily tasks and even the monthly accounting based on the Papershift reports is much easier and faster.
cons: Sometimes I had some difficulties to find the right settings in the many different settings pages. But as one doesn’t need those on a daily base, it‘s not a big deal.

review_title: Bye bye to cumbersome excel worksheets !
description: Got rid of cumbersome excel worksheets GIven access to to employees More dynamic shift plans
author: Gernot S.
pros: Within a short time I got rid of the excel worksheet which I used to to my shift planning. Now I can also ask other employees to do this work and the employees love it because they get access to it from their smartphones. I am not using all features but the extract of worked hours goes straight into my accounting system.
cons: I am looking for a more direct way to print the shift plan without going through export and download. But at the rate of change the product is experiencing I think this will come soon.

review_title: A versatile and easy to use Tool
description: It was good. I barely had any problems and would recommend using it for your company.
author: Fatih E.
pros: The simpleness. Being able to do your work and applying your times easily, without hassle.
cons: A little bit slow and that it's accessed through a website. A dedicated app would be much better.

author: Johannes R.
pros: The Shiftplan is very food to use. For Position Manager as well. Easy to configure
cons: The Usability for Workers. It will be easier if workers can use a app and login without private mail account. Maybe Personal-ID oder personal Keyword. Not in a browser. In a Android or iOS app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tolles Tool auch für kleine Unternehmen, um den Überblick zu behalten
description: Wir können unsere komplette Urlaubs-Jahresplanung hier abbilden. Man kann Urlaubsansprüche auch in Stunden angeben und verrechnen lassen, das hilft beim Einsatz von Teilzeitmitarbeitern enorm, um alles sauber abbilden zu können. Die Mitarbeiter selbst haben auch einen besseren Überblick über ihre Arbeitszeiten, Zeiterfassung sowie ihren eingereichten oder bereits genommenen Urlaub. Meine Schichtplanung kann ich auch hierüber abbilden, bzw. den Vertretungsplan in der Urlaubszeit. Die Zeiterfassung hilft, Überstunden besser zu monitoren.
author: Monika K.
pros: Den Mitarbeitern gefällt, dass sie ihre Arbeitszeiten auch über die App einsehen können. Für uns als Arbeitgeber entlastet es enorm bei der Schicht- und Urlaubsplanung sowie der Zeiterfassung. Die Urlaubsplanung kann nun in einem Tool für jeden sichtbar gemacht werden, ohne dass Zeiten bereits bestätigt werden müssen. Somit sehen die Kollegen, wo andere bereits Urlaub eingetragen haben.
cons: Die Software ist für richtige Schichtbetriebe ausgelegt, Hauptaugenmerk Gastro, meines Erachtens. Das ist nicht immer kompatibel mit unseren "starren" Arbeitszeiten, es gibt aber gute Möglichkeiten auch das abzubilden. Die Darstellungsart der Wochenübersicht finde ich momentan noch nicht ideal, aber man kann sich behelfen mit Tags und verschiedenen Ansichten. Optimierungsbedarf gäbe es aus meiner Sicht beim Zurücknehmen von Urlauben, dass die Schichten wieder automatisch belegt werden. Auch bei der Anpassung von Arbeitszeiten und den dazugehörigen Sollstunden kommt es manchmal zu einem Durcheinander, wenn man nicht alle Eckpunkte bedenkt, da könnten Reminder helfen, das Ganze sauber neu aufzusetzen. Auch beim stundenweise Ausbuchen von Urlaub funktioniert die Zeiterfassung meines Erachtens nicht kompatibel. Aber das sind alles Kleinigkeiten, die man manuell trotzdem abbilden kann. Man muss aber höllisch aufpassen, dass es dann bei allen noch stimmt, bei 10 Mitarbeitern mag das noch überblickbar sein, bei mehr Mitarbeitern stelle ich mir das schwierig vor.

description: Habe mich nur geärgert, damit ist jetzt schluss. Ich werde kündigen.
author: Emanuel B.
pros: Die Software ist übersichtlich aufgebaut und intuitiv nutzbar.
cons: Der Support ist sehr schlecht, Probleme werden nicht gelöst. Teilweise laufen drei Zeiterfassungen eines Mitarbeiters gleichzeitig. Das Problem wurde seit 6 Monaten nicht behoben.

author: Stephen D.
pros: The time savings and workload in the duty planning and working time capture.
cons: Roster printouts are unfortunately only monochrome.

description: it was actually very fine
author: fabiana E.
pros: that you can see exactzly how many hours you worked in a certain period
cons: it´s difficulty to manage your holidays (half days or maybe hours would be better)

review_title: The best choice we made in the last year!
description: We use Papershift for the management of our two restaurants and are very happy that we made the choice for it although the price deterred us. After four months, a lot of gain in time of our leaderships and a lot of appreciated reduction of bureaucracy we really recommend this software!
author: Julian K.
pros: The ease of use, the great support (chat or by telephone) and the possibility to make changes in the shiftplan and inform the staff simultaneously without the need to use group chats or so on.
cons: By now there’s honestly nothing I could complain about. I’d prefer using an app for admins but as far as I know they are already developing one. Furthermore it’s very easy to use it via safari- I can wait until the app is done.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's a simpler system for a small organisation like ours to have and use.
author: Paul B.
pros: Very easy to set up. Great customer service and support. Very easy to train in new users. Interface very accessible and well laid out.
cons: The events feature could do with colour coded options. Would love if the events was connected to the time tracking. We adopt the events to record our working week - but it would be much better if events was designed specifically for this purpose.

description: I am very happy , was looking for a simple Softeware to monitor Working Time
author: Christian W.
pros: Easy to use in Daily business, online based, app for the iphone
cons: Interface could be sometimes more intuitive

description: Good for the job
author: Nick S.
pros: That you can handle everything easily see how many hours you worked and can see everyone else
cons: That it’s not an app and you have to login every time again

author: Vera G.
pros: It is very easy and inuitive to use. The customer support is great and very helpful but since the program is very easy to handle and self-explaining there were not many situations where I needed their support yet.
cons: I find it rather expensive and it would be great if they just offered something like a flat rate for 0-9 employees, 10-19 employees and so on. Also the invoice is not so transparent after registering one or two new employees.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you get into it, it's worth the money
description: In then end, the CEO decided to go with a functionality that was already available in the pharamacy software. I don't think it was the right decision.
author: Simon R.
pros: - great design - mostly intuitive - everyone is encouraged to participate in organizing - iPad time clock is amazing - setting up is complex (not complicated): until all things are configured - how are breaks handled? How do holidays work?... - great overview and statistics - amaaaaaaaazing support. On the phone, immediately, etc.
cons: - strangely enough, it was too modern for the rather traditional setting of our pharmacy. - I had to experiment quite a bit until I found out how to customize it - annoying ads. As soon as I started to use it, my Youtube ads were completely Papershift, aaaaall the time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very good software for companys to manage working hours and absences
description: It is a very good software, which is easy to understand. You can adjust to your needs. The support is very good and fast!
author: Philipp W.
pros: it's very easy to understand this software.
cons: i don't know what i can write. For me it is very comfortable as an employee.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I think is the best software who I check and use bis now
description: super, support ist very quickly and precise
author: Calin M.
pros: very simple and very quickly, support is perfect and very quickly
cons: I don't found problem bis now, I use 2 month approximately but without any problem.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and very organised in the structure.
cons: It was all good, may a Layout change every months is an new option.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Great, reliable and easy to use.
author: Dickens O.
pros: The papershift software is very easy to use, youdont need knowldge in planning and development.I can summarize this as Usa.bility(the ability to be used by all)
cons: It requires internet to use, this may limit the offline users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
